vocab.meaning: mày mò, sửa chữa vặt (để tìm hiểu hoặc cải thiện)
vocab.example: I’ve loved to tinker with old watches since I was ten, and that curiosity has stayed with me ever since.

vocab.meaning: giết thời gian một cách thư thả, dễ chịu
vocab.example: In my childhood, I would often wile away my Sunday afternoons sketching characters from my favorite comic books.
I stumbled upon a collection of vintage coins in my attic as a kid, and it ignited a lifelong passion for numismatics.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào, làm bùng lên (một sự hứng thú)
vocab.example: A school trip to the local observatory sparked off my fascination with astronomy, which is still my go-to hobby.

vocab.meaning: có nguồn gốc từ, bắt đầu từ (thời điểm trong quá khứ)
vocab.example: My interest in traditional woodworking actually goes back to the time I helped my grandfather in his shed.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu nhận ra hoặc quan tâm đến điều gì đó
vocab.example: I picked up on the subtle techniques of photography by watching my father, and I’ve been obsessed with it ever since.

vocab.meaning: loại bỏ (âm thanh, sự xao nhãng) để tập trung
vocab.example: When I play the piano, I can block out the entire world, a habit I developed back in my early school days.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi, ghi chép lại sự thay đổi/phát triển
vocab.example: I started to keep track of rare bird sightings in a small journal when I was eight, and I still do it today.

vocab.meaning: đổ hết (tâm huyết, thời gian) vào việc gì
vocab.example: The amount of effort I pour into model building today is the same as the passion I had when I was a toddler.

vocab.meaning: tận dụng, sử dụng (kỹ năng/kinh nghiệm tích lũy lâu nay)
vocab.example: Even now, I often draw on the basic coding skills I first experimented with on our old family computer.
